articles.title: Asia markets temper Iran deal optimism, BOJ hikes rates
articles.headline: Asia markets temper Iran deal optimism, BOJ hikes rates
articles.author: Gregor Stuart Hunter
articles.summary: Asian stocks made cautious gains Tuesday after Monday's rally on the US-Iran peace deal. BOJ hiked rates to 1% (highest since 1995) in a 7-1 vote. Nikkei briefly crossed 70,000. Brent crude at $82.96 (-0.3%), 10Y UST at 4.475% (+0.8 bp), DXY at 99.75, Gold at $4,324.32 (+0.4%). China retail sales weaker than expected weighed on Hang Seng.
articles.lead_paragraph: Asian stocks made cautious gains on Tuesday following a rally in the previous session driven by news of a U.S.-Iran peace deal, while investors assessed a widely expected Bank of Japan rate increase to a 31-year high.
articles.extracted_text: Full extraction from Reuters — see briefing.md for integrated synthesis.

articles.title: What happened overnight - Tuesday 16th June 2026
articles.headline: What happened overnight - Tuesday 16th June 2026
articles.author: Abm
articles.summary: Nikkei 225 breached 70,000 for first time, closed at 69,713.05 (+0.6%). KOSPI hit record 8,721.64 (+2.1%). Hang Seng -1.3% on weak China data. Dow record close 51,671.03 (+0.9%), S&P 500 +1.7%, Nasdaq +3.1%. SpaceX +19.6% on second day after largest IPO in history.
articles.lead_paragraph: Asian equities traded mostly higher on Tuesday as investors welcomed signs that shipping through the Strait of Hormuz could soon return to normal.

articles.title: Bank of Japan hikes rates to 1%, highest since 1995
articles.headline: Bank of Japan hikes rates to 1%, highest since 1995
articles.author: CNBC
articles.summary: BOJ hiked 25 bps to 1.0% (7-1 vote, Asada dissented). First time at 1% since 1995. JGB 10Y +3 bp to 2.615%. Yen at 160.22-160.34. Consumer inflation 1.4% (below 2% target) but PPI surged 6.3% in May. BOJ will continue JGB taper to ¥2T/month by April 2027. Governor Ueda missed briefing for medical treatment.
articles.lead_paragraph: The Bank of Japan raised its policy rate to 1% from 0.75%, taking borrowing costs to their highest level since 1995 in a widely expected move.

articles.title: Oil prices hit three-month low and markets reach record high amid Iran deal breakthrough
articles.headline: Oil prices hit three-month low and markets reach record high amid Iran deal breakthrough
articles.author: The Guardian
articles.summary: Brent crude dropped ~4% Monday to ~$83/bbl (lowest since March 10), down from $93 on Thursday and $87.50 Friday. WTI fell 4.9% to $80.75. Strait of Hormuz blocked since early March halted ~20M bbl/day. Deal signing expected Friday June 19. Trump: 'Let the oil flow!' 60-day negotiation period follows. IG analyst says oil may not fall much further near-term due to complex nuclear negotiations.
articles.lead_paragraph: Oil prices fell after the announcement of a US-Iran peace deal, amid hopes the strait of Hormuz would soon reopen to commercial shipping.
articles.extracted_text: Full extraction from The Guardian — see briefing.md for integrated synthesis.

articles.title: Stock Market News, June 15, 2026: U.S. Stocks Jump, Oil Drops on Iran Pact
articles.headline: Stock Market News, June 15, 2026: U.S. Stocks Jump, Oil Drops on Iran Pact
articles.author: Caitlin McCabe
articles.summary: All three major US indexes jumped Monday. Nasdaq +3%, S&P 500 +1.7%, Dow to record. SpaceX +20% following IPO gains. Chip stocks +5%+. Brent -4.8% to $83.17 (lowest since March). WTI -4.9% to $80.75. Bond yields retreated as lower oil eased inflation concerns. Traders reduced bets on Fed rate hike this year. Pre-market Tuesday futures: DJIA +0.05%, S&P -0.08%, Nasdaq +0.02%. Stoxx 600 +0.47%, Shanghai -0.11%. UST 10Y at 4.446%, VIX 16.16 (-0.25%), Gold $4,366.20 (+0.34%), Bitcoin $66,469.66 (-0.12%), Crude $78.92 (-2.27%).
articles.lead_paragraph: Stocks and bonds rallied, while oil fell to its lowest level since early March, after the U.S. and Iran agreed on an interim peace deal that would reopen the Strait of Hormuz.
articles.extracted_text: Full extraction from WSJ — see briefing.md for integrated synthesis.

articles.title: Fed to hold rates this year, cut calls fade as war inflation persists
articles.headline: Fed to hold rates this year, cut calls fade as war inflation persists
articles.author: Reuters
articles.summary: Nearly 70% of economists (72 of 102) forecast the fed funds rate stays at 3.50%-3.75% for the rest of 2026. Fed may drop easing bias at June meeting, setting up potential 2026 hikes.
articles.lead_paragraph: Nearly 70% of economists polled forecast the key rate would stay in its current 3.50%-3.75% range for the rest of 2026.

articles.title: SpaceX stock jumps 20% in first full day of trading after record debut
articles.headline: SpaceX stock jumps 20% in first full day of trading after record debut
articles.author: CNBC
articles.summary: SpaceX (SPCX) IPO priced at $135/share Friday. Opened at $150 (+11%), closed Friday at $161 (+19%). Monday added another +19.6%. Market cap now >$2.1 trillion. Pre-market Tuesday: up >10%, approaching Amazon's market cap. Largest IPO in history. Wells Fargo raised S&P 500 year-end target to 7,950 citing stronger corporate earnings.
articles.lead_paragraph: SpaceX on Friday saw its stock closing at around $161 after being priced at $135 per share, putting the company's market capitalization above $2 trillion.
